name: query-physics-summary
description: Return physics and collision summaries for a world or a specific actor, including primitive components and physics constraints.

name: edit-collision-settings
description: Edit collision settings on an actor PrimitiveComponent, including profile, enabled mode, object channel, and channel responses.

name: edit-physics-simulation
description: Edit physics simulation settings on an actor PrimitiveComponent: simulate physics, gravity, mass, mass scale, and damping.

name: create-physics-constraint
description: Create a PhysicsConstraintComponent on an actor and bind it to two PrimitiveComponents with optional v1 limit settings.

name: edit-physics-constraint
description: Edit a PhysicsConstraintComponent's constrained components and basic linear/angular limit settings.

name: apply-physical-material
description: Apply a PhysicalMaterial asset as the override physical material on an actor PrimitiveComponent.
